name: life-ustc-server
description: USTC Life Server - Course and schedule management API using SvelteKit

scripts.build: bun --silent run tools/dev/quiet.ts -- sh -c 'svelte-kit sync && bun run db generate && bun run tools/build/openapi/generate-spec.ts && vite build'
scripts.dev: svelte-kit sync && bun run db generate && bun run db migrate deploy && vite dev --host 127.0.0.1 --port 3000 --strictPort
scripts.verify: bun --silent run tools/dev/quiet.ts -- biome check && bun --silent run tools/dev/check.ts contracts && bun --silent run tools/dev/check.ts i18n && bun --silent run tools/dev/check.ts routes && bun --silent run tools/dev/quiet.ts -- sh -c 'svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.typecheck.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.typecheck.tests.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.typecheck.operational.json' && bun --silent run test
scripts.verify:full: bun --silent run verify && bun --silent run tools/dev/quiet.ts -- bun run seed && bun --silent run tools/dev/quiet.ts -- vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts && bun --silent run tools/dev/check.ts e2e && bun --silent run build && bun --silent run tools/dev/e2e.ts prepare && bun --silent run tools/dev/quiet.ts -- bun run seed && bun --silent run tools/dev/quiet.ts -- bunx playwright test --reporter=list
